rationale: This is a clean analysis task. The agent correctly traced the code path from ShowMiddleware (show_middleware.dart) through FinnkinoApi.getSchedule() (finnkino_api.dart) to ShowParser.parse() (show_parser.dart), identified the relevant files with line numbers (show_parser.dart lines 25-26 for dttmShowStart/dttmShowEnd extraction), and correctly determined that the parser does NOT gracefully handle a missing start-time element because tagContents() throws ArgumentError when the element is absent. The agent cited xml_utils.dart lines 3-10 for the throw behavior and show_middleware.dart line 56 for the exception catch. The agent made no code modifications and provided an accurate technical analysis of the missing-handling behavior.
